full_text:
Jin Qi 金奇
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jin Qi (金奇)was born in Danyang. Leader of Chinese renegades along with Mao Gan, active in the Huangshan range of southern Danyang. Conquered by He Qi in 208.
